findings.title: Add Notification Priority Levels
findings.description: Implement a three-tier notification priority system (urgent, normal, low) to help users distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.
assumptions: Users need to differentiate between critical and routine notifications.

evidence.excerpt: Users need a way to distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.

recommendations: Design a visual indicator for each priority level.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN a notification is sent THEN it should display the correct priority level (urgent, normal, low).

findings.title: Fix Notification Delivery on Android 14
findings.description: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users.
assumptions: Users on Android 14 need reliable notification delivery.

evidence.excerpt: Several users on Android 14 report that push notifications silently fail.

recommendations: Investigate FCM token refresh issues and ensure delivery callback fires.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an Android 14 user WHEN a notification is sent THEN it should be delivered successfully without manual intervention.

findings.title: Implement ML-based Notification Batching
findings.description: Develop a machine learning model to batch low-priority notifications into a digest format, optimizing delivery timing based on user engagement patterns.
assumptions: Users prefer receiving low-priority notifications in batches.

evidence.excerpt: Users prefer receiving low-priority notifications in a batch format.

recommendations: Create an ML model to analyze user engagement for optimal batching.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model processes them THEN they should be batched and delivered at optimal times.

findings.title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
findings.description: Create a user preference page that allows users to opt in/out of specific notification categories (marketing, product updates, etc.).
assumptions: Users want control over the types of notifications they receive.

evidence.excerpt: Users should be able to opt in/out of specific notification categories.

recommendations: Develop a new preferences API endpoint and a React settings component.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification preferences page WHEN they select categories THEN their preferences should be saved and respected.

findings.title: Reduce Notification Delivery Latency
findings.description: Optimize the notification delivery process to reduce the 95th percentile latency from 340ms to under 200ms.
assumptions: Timely delivery of notifications enhances user experience.

evidence.excerpt: Performance monitoring shows p95 notification delivery latency at 340ms.

recommendations: Implement asynchronous writes and batch inserts for analytics events.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN measured THEN the p95 delivery latency should be under 200ms.

findings.title: Improve Accessibility Features in Notification Center
findings.description: Enhance the design of the notification center to address accessibility challenges for screen reader users and colorblind individuals.
assumptions: Accessibility improvements will benefit a wider range of users.

evidence.excerpt: Several users have reported accessibility challenges.

recommendations: Conduct user testing with accessibility tools to identify specific issues.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification center WHEN using a screen reader THEN all notifications should be read correctly and clearly.

findings.title: Collect User Feedback on Notification Preferences
findings.description: Implement a feedback mechanism to gather user preferences regarding notification timing and content.
assumptions: User feedback is essential for improving notification personalization.

evidence.excerpt: There is a lack of data collection regarding user preferences.

recommendations: Create a survey or feedback form integrated into the app.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback form WHEN they submit their preferences THEN the data should be recorded for analysis.

findings.title: Experiment with Notification Timing Optimization
findings.description: Conduct an experiment to test different notification timings to optimize user engagement and click-through rates.
assumptions: Different timings may significantly affect user engagement.

evidence.excerpt: Conduct an experiment to test the impact of different notification timings.

recommendations: Design and implement the experiment with control and variable groups.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification timing experiment is conducted WHEN users receive notifications THEN engagement metrics should be tracked and analyzed.

findings.title: Monitor Notification Delivery Performance
findings.description: Set up monitoring and alerting for notification delivery performance metrics, including latency and delivery success rates.
assumptions: Monitoring is essential for maintaining notification delivery quality.

evidence.excerpt: This metric tracks the 95th percentile delivery latency of notifications.

recommendations: Implement dashboards and alerts for key performance indicators.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN performance metrics are collected THEN alerts should trigger for any anomalies.

findings.title: Document Notification System Compliance
findings.description: Create documentation to ensure compliance with accessibility standards and privacy regulations related to notifications.
assumptions: Compliance documentation is necessary for legal and ethical standards.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in source.

recommendations: Draft a VPAT and other compliance documents.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN compliance documentation is created WHEN reviewed THEN it should meet all required standards.

summary: The analysis has identified critical requirements for the SmartNotify product, focusing on enhancing notification prioritization, delivery reliability, user preferences, and accessibility. Each requirement is structured with clear acceptance criteria and dependencies, ensuring a comprehensive approach to improving user engagement and satisfaction.
